envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Recommendations are PROPOSED_NOT_APPROVED. C2 Slack read-first runtime LIVE; Slack-based aha moments now RUNTIME_READY substrate.

items.name: Aha Moment Map Recommendation
items.description: Ranks proposed first-week aha moments per role / department / connector / workflow. C2 Slack RUNTIME_READY substrate informs Slack-based aha ranking.
items.human_readable_summary: Proposes first-week aha moments per role. Slack catch-up summaries rank first because C2 Slack runtime is LIVE. Safe-fallback aha moments always available.
items.model_usage_notes: Slack-based aha moments now have RUNTIME_READY substrate (PR #185). Other connector aha moments remain RECOMMENDATION_READY until per-connector runtime lands.

ranked_regions.rationale_summary: C2 Slack read-first runtime LIVE. Channels.list + conversations.history substrate ready.
Safe-fallback paths work without connector activation; HIGH confidence.

ranked_regions.region_label: Google Workspace email triage + calendar summary
ranked_regions.rationale_summary: C3 forward-substrate; requires connector runtime + DWD review.

ranked_regions.region_label: Project Tracker (Jira / Linear) sprint risk summary

ranked_regions.rationale_summary: Stage 2 recommendation-only workflows; admin approval required.

items.rationale: Slack catch-up ranks first because the C2 Slack read-first runtime is LIVE — the aha moment can land today. Safe-fallback paths rank next because they require no connector activation. Other connector aha moments wait on their respective C-slice runtimes.
cross_map_dependencies: Aha Moment Map depends on Role Map (first-week wins per role)
Aha Moment Map depends on Tool Map (connector activation drives aha potential)
Aha Moment Map depends on Workflow Map (recommendation aha depends on ADR-0081 Stage 2)
Aha Moment Map depends on Risk Map (aha moments cannot violate Risk Map exclusions)
items.approval_gate_required: Admin approval at D4 + per-connector RULE 21 research arc for new connector aha moments.
DMW_scope_implications: Aha Moment Map proposes per-role DMW scope priorities (which categories deliver fastest aha)
Safe-fallback aha moments operate inside baseline DMW scope only
Slack-based aha moments scope to PERSONAL or ENTERPRISE wallet per ADR-0046 dual-context routing
User confirmation required before DMW scope reflects an aha-moment proposal
governance_review_points: Admin must approve every aha-moment activation
First-connector activations per ADR-0084 (Slack now C2 RUNTIME_READY)
Workflow Stage 2+ progression governance-bound per ADR-0081
Safe-fallback always available even when no connectors activate
